versions.label: TouchDesigner 2020
breakingChanges: Python 3.5 → 3.7: async/await keywords reserved, some C extension rebuilds needed

versions.label: TouchDesigner 2021
highlights: GPU Direct support for video I/O
breakingChanges: Python 3.7 → 3.9: dictionary merge operator (|), removed deprecated collections ABCs from top-level
Some tscript commands deprecated in favor of Python equivalents

versions.label: TouchDesigner 2022
breakingChanges: OpenGL → Vulkan: custom GLSL shaders may need adaptation for Vulkan pipeline
Some legacy rendering features removed with OpenGL backend

versions.label: TouchDesigner 2023
highlights: Project file format change (not backward compatible)
breakingChanges: Python 3.9 → 3.11: exception groups, tomllib added, some deprecated APIs removed
.toe files saved in 2023 cannot be loaded in 2022 or earlier

versions.label: TouchDesigner 2024
breakingChanges: Deprecated OpenGL-only rendering path fully removed

versions.label: TouchDesigner 2025
highlights: Full POP (Point Operators) family — GPU-based 3D geometry
Color Space Workflows with HDR support
3D Texture and 2D Array support across most TOPs
Layer Mix TOP for unlimited layer compositing
NVIDIA RTX Video TOP for AI-enhanced processing
breakingChanges: Polygonize POP now accepts only 3D input (use Trace POP for 2D)
ZED operators require ZED TOP connection (workflow restructured)
Web Render TOP no longer supports shared cache between instances
File In CHOP now preserves channel names from .chan files
